<h1 id="heading-1"><strong class="my-custom-class">使用ACME插件管理SSL证书</strong></h1><h2 id="heading-2"><strong class="my-custom-class">简介</strong></h2><p>ACME插件可以让Kong使用来自Let’s Encrypt或者其他ACMEv2服务的证书，并且支持自动续期。</p><h2 id="heading-3"><strong class="my-custom-class">启用插件</strong></h2><p>全局启用，但是在配置中可以指定域名规则。</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;curl -X POST http://<admin-hostname>:8001/plugins/ \\\n    --data \&quot;name=acme\&quot;  \\\n    --data \&quot;config.account_email=example@example.com\&quot;\n&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="64269ab4-aa0e-435b-8831-ba94ec936fc0"></pre><h2 id="heading-4"><strong class="my-custom-class">配置插件</strong></h2><h3 id="heading-5"><strong class="my-custom-class">Kong的配置</strong></h3><ul class="my-custom-class"><li class="my-custom-class"><p>Kong需要监听80端口；</p></li><li class="my-custom-class"><p><code class="my-custom-class">kong.conf</code>文件中需要配置<code class="my-custom-class">lua_ssl_trusted_certificate</code>， Ubuntu/Debian一般是：<code class="my-custom-class">/etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt</code>，CentOS/Fedora/RHEL一般是：<code class="my-custom-class">/etc/ssl/certs/ca-bundle.crt</code>;</p></li></ul><h3 id="heading-6"><strong class="my-custom-class">插件配置</strong></h3><p>ACME插件可以使用Kong的数据库，也可以使用Redis数据库，以Redis为例：</p><pre height="0" database="{&quot;items&quot;:[{&quot;title&quot;:&quot;代码块&quot;,&quot;content&quot;:&quot;_format_version: \&quot;1.1\&quot;\n# this section is not necessary if there's already a route that matches\n# /.well-known/acme-challenge path with http protocol\nservices:\n  - name: acme-dummy\n    url: http://127.0.0.1:65535\n    routes:\n      - name: acme-dummy\n        protocols:\n          - http\n        paths:\n          - /.well-known/acme-challenge\nplugins:\n  - name: acme\n    config:\n      account_email: example@myexample.com\n      domains:\n        - \&quot;*.example.com\&quot;\n        - \&quot;example.com\&quot;\n      tos_accepted: true\n      storage: redis\n      storage_config:\n        redis:\n          host: redis.service\n          port: 6379\n\n&quot;,&quot;language&quot;:&quot;Unknown&quot;}],&quot;activatedIndex&quot;:0}" uuid="d8dc2916-cddf-422d-b09b-66af45ca2a34"></pre><p>domains字段下配置希望用ACME管理SSL证书的域名。</p><h2 id="heading-7"><strong class="my-custom-class">创建证书</strong></h2><p>访问上一步配置的域名，如：<strong class="my-custom-class">https://www.example.com</strong>，等1分钟左右，ACME会自动申请SSL证书。</p><p>在Konga中可见由ACME管理的SSL证书。</p><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="" title=""><toc></toc>
